items.title: Just $30 today gets this 100W 3-port USB-C laptop charger with smart display and touch control (50% off)
items.summary:
Courtesy of Baseus’ official Amazon storefront, you can now score the brand’s latest 100W Picogo AE21 100W 3-port charger for $29.99 with free shipping for Prime members or in orders over $35. Don’t forget to enter promo code 8O3OICC2 during checkout to see the discounted price. This is regularly a $60 charging unit, which you can score with a 50% discount using the promo code. It dropped to the $38 mark last year during the holiday sale, but today’s deal knocks it further down with an additional $8 off. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this charger, and it delivers some serious value compared to similar display-equipped models out there from the likes of Anker. Head below for more details.

items.title: Anker SOLIX Spring Sale drops expanded 7,680Wh F3800 Plus bundle to exclusive $3,608 ($3,690 off), more from $120
items.summary:
Update 3/12: The exclusive bonus savings code now seems to work on the E10 Smart Hybrid Whole-Home Backup System and its bundle options alongside all the other offers in this sale.

Anker has launched its Early Bird Spring Sale lineup with up to 65% discounts on its power stations, bundles, and accessories – including an exclusive bonus savings code, FREE gear with select models, and clearance/refurbished unit deals. One of the notable higher-end offers is on Anker’s SOLIX F3800 Plus Portable Power Station with an expansion battery at $3,608.10 shipped, after using the exclusive code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, which beats out Amazon’s pricing by $191. Coming down from its $7,298 full price, we’ve seen this particular bundle discounted regularly to $4,399 in 2026, with occasional falls lower to this same rate, most recently in a series of short-term Amazon lightning sales. While we have seen it fall to two lower prices in the past (during Black Friday and Christmas sales), you’re still getting a solid 48% markdown here that cuts $3,500 off the going rate, landing it at the third-lowest price we have tracked. You can also find the standalone station down at $2,374 shipped during this sale using the above code, with the rest of the massive lineup of deals available to browse below.
